# Governance Context

## Identity

NestJS GraphQL API — Nx monorepo with MongoDB persistence and Redis caching.

## Stack

| Layer     | Technology            | Version |
| --------- | --------------------- | ------- |
| Runtime   | Node.js               | 20.x    |
| Language  | TypeScript            | 5.9.2   |
| Framework | NestJS                | 11.0.0  |
| API       | GraphQL (Apollo)      | 5.4.0   |
| Database  | MongoDB (Mongoose)    | 9.2.4   |
| Cache     | Redis (cache-manager) | 7.2.8   |
| Monorepo  | Nx                    | 22.5.4  |
| Testing   | Jest                  | 30.0.2  |
| Linting   | ESLint 9 + Prettier   | 3.6.2   |

## Architecture Pattern

Modular Monolith — single NestJS application composed of self-contained feature modules.

## Request Lifecycle

```
HTTP → Apollo Server (/graphql, port 3000)
  → Resolver (query/mutation dispatch)
    → Service (business logic + cache-aside)
      → Redis (60s TTL) → hit: return
      → miss: Mongoose Model → MongoDB → cache → return
```

## Module Map

| Module      | Location              | Purpose                                        |
| ----------- | --------------------- | ---------------------------------------------- |
| AppModule   | `apps/api/src/app/`   | Root — GraphQL, Mongoose, Redis, Config wiring |
| ItemsModule | `apps/api/src/items/` | Item CRUD via GraphQL                          |
| api-e2e     | `apps/api-e2e/`       | End-to-end API tests                           |

## Dependency Rules

- Resolver → Service → Mongoose Model + Cache Manager
- Feature modules do not import other feature modules
- Cross-cutting concerns (config, cache) are global via AppModule
- No circular dependencies between modules

## Testing Strategy

- Jest 30 with `@nestjs/testing`
- Unit tests co-located: `*.spec.ts` beside source
- Mock Mongoose models and CACHE_MANAGER in service tests
- Mock the service in resolver tests
- E2E tests in `apps/api-e2e/`

## File Conventions

- Modules: `<name>.module.ts`
- Resolvers: `<name>.resolver.ts`
- Services: `<name>.service.ts`
- Schemas: `schemas/<name>.schema.ts`
- DTOs: `dto/<action>-<name>.input.ts`
- Tests: `<name>.<type>.spec.ts`

## CI/CD

- Build: `nx build api`
- Test: `nx test api`
- Lint: `nx lint api`
- E2E: `nx e2e api-e2e`
- Serve: `nx serve api`
